receipt.copied: Receipt text copied. Paste into email or WhatsApp.
receipt.shareFail: Could not share. Try Download and attach the file.

language.autoNote: Other languages: use the browser’s page translation in the menu.

topbar.onlineHint: Device reports a network connection (may still be slow or unusable).
topbar.offlineHint: No network (common in rural areas). The app still works with data saved on this device until you can sync.
topbar.syncedHint: Last sync with server. Tap to refresh harvests & sales.
topbar.walletOnHint: Mock Sui wallet on: you can link optional SUI amounts to sales.
topbar.walletOffHint: Mock Sui wallet off. UGX sales, stock, and credit still work.
topbar.translateHint: Choose a language. The page is translated in your browser.

offlineBar.offlineA: Keep using AgriTrack: orders, harvests, and sales can save on this device. When you have internet again, use
offlineBar.apiBeforeSync: (weak signal or the API is down). Try again from a place with a better network. Your last actions may be saved on this device. Tap

seasonalPage.deleteConfirm: Delete this plan from the calendar? This cannot be undone.
seasonalPage.addSaved: Season plan added. Reminders appear on the dashboard.
seasonalPage.weatherHint: Local weather for any season, alongside your full-year plan (open the page for the full view):

farm.title: My Farm
farm.sub: Manage production: add, edit, or delete harvests. Data syncs from the API when enabled.

seasonal.title: Seasonal planning
seasonal.sub: Your calendar for all seasons: planting, care, harvest, and storage through dry, wet, and in-between.

weather.title: Season weather
weather.sub: Forecasts and rainfall context for the whole year. Pair this with your seasonal calendar to time work in any season, not just the rains.

supply.title: Supply chain
supply.sub: Farm to storage to buyer, then shipment steps per sale.

orders.title: Orders
orders.sub: Shipment & delivery tracking for your sales (same flow for traders on /orders).

stock.title: Stock
stock.sub: Auto-calculated from harvests minus sales. No manual entry.

marketplace.title: Marketplace
marketplace.sub: Browse farmers' listed produce. Coordinate buys via recorded sales.

purchases.title: Purchases
purchases.sub: Purchase history when farmers record you as buyer.

sales.title: Sales
sales.sub: Record selling activity (buyer, produce, amount, paid or credit). Ties to stock and credit.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.sub: SUI balance, send or receive (mock). Link sales in the wallet UI.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.sub: In-app alerts and optional browser push: low stock, credit, and payments.

search.title: Search
search.sub: Results from your harvests, sales, and (for traders) marketplace listings.

insights.title: Insights
insights.sub: Role-aware snapshot and shortcuts. Always points you to the next useful screen.

admin.title: Users
admin.sub: Directory, roles, export. The production user list comes from the API.

dailyLog.title: Daily farm log
dailyLog.sub: Per-day field notes, costs, and issues. Farmers submit; others read.

notificationsPage.alertsLead: Low-stock warnings, partial-payment reminders, overdue credit, and recent sales or purchases — all from your synced data.
notificationsPage.smsLogLead: Messages that would go to the phone number on your profile when you record sales, payments, or send debt reminders (synced with the API when online).
notificationsPage.smsLogEmpty: No SMS yet — record a sale, mark a payment, or use debt reminders to populate this log.
notificationsPage.pushEnabled: Browser notifications are on. You’ll get alerts when the server sends them.
notificationsPage.pushDenied: Allow this app in your notification settings so browser alerts can appear.
notificationsPage.pushUnavailable: Browser notifications can’t be turned on here (blocked or not supported on this device).
notificationsPage.pushApiRequired: Connect the app to your online service first.
notificationsPage.pushDisabled: Browser notifications are off for this app.
notificationsPage.noAlerts: No system alerts at the moment.

upgradePage.farmerSub: Boost a harvest on the marketplace.
upgradePage.traderSub: Priority access and credit where enabled.

upgradeCards.apiOff: Connect the online API (set {{flag}} in your environment) to see prices, pay, and activate your upgrade.
upgradeCards.plansError: Could not load prices. Check connection and API.
upgradeCards.adminBlurb: Upgrades: farmer and trader accounts only.
upgradeCards.momoAfterPay: Pay {{amount}} on your phone first. When you get the SMS, paste the transaction reference in the field below. Leave it empty until then.
upgradeCards.needListing: My farm: add a synced listing first
upgradeCards.noListings: Add a harvest on My farm and sync, then return here.

featured.title: Featured Seller
featured.desc: Higher placement on the marketplace for one listing.

premium.title: Premium Trader
premium.desc: Priority and credit options where the platform allows.

upgradeCards.toastFeatured: Featured is on for this listing.
upgradeCards.toastRef: Paste the reference from your SMS after you pay (at least 4 characters). This appears if the field is empty or too short when you tap Pay.
upgradeCards.cardNotConfigured: Card checkout is not enabled on the server. Set STRIPE_SECRET_KEY on the API.
upgradeCards.stripeCardBlurb: Card payment runs in secure checkout, then you return to AgriTrack. Your upgrade applies automatically after payment completes.
upgradeCards.premiumSubscriptionStripe: Premium Trader: pay with a card; you return here after checkout to finish in AgriTrack.
upgradeCards.orPayWithMomo: or pay with mobile money (reference below)
upgradeCards.stripeNoUrl: Card checkout unavailable (check API Stripe config).

auth.headlineMorning: Welcome back! Keep growing, keep earning.
auth.headlineNoon: Good afternoon. Your farm data is ready.
auth.headlineEvening: Evening. Sign in to track sales and stock.
auth.bullet1: Harvests, stock, and sales in one place
auth.bullet2: Harvests, stock, sales & credit in one workspace
auth.bullet3: For farmers and traders. Platform operations stay off the public app.
auth.bullet4: Built for villages: if the network fails, your work can stay on this device and sync later
auth.regBullet1: Log produce and see stock update automatically
auth.regBullet2: Record sales, partial payments & credit due dates
auth.regBullet4: Optional Sui wallet for on-chain payment proof
auth.regBullet5: Spotty internet in rural areas. Keep logging; sync when you are back online.
auth.footer: AgriTrack: farm logs, stock, and payments.
auth.offlineQuick: Choosing a role fills email and password, or use your own offline account.
auth.quickLoginApiHint: Tap Farmer or Trader to prefill sign-in fields. Those accounts must exist on your API (for example seed locally). Use the same passwords as in the app docs.
auth.productionSignIn: Sign in with the email and password from your organization. Only farmer and trader accounts are created through this app.
auth.terms: I agree to the terms and fair use of AgriTrack.
auth.termsRich: I agree to the <0>Terms of Service</0> and <1>Privacy Policy</1>.
auth.registerFailAdmin: Admin accounts cannot be registered publicly. Use farmer or trader, or ask your administrator.
auth.acceptTerms: Please accept the terms to continue.
auth.accountCreated: Account created. Sign in with your email and password.
auth.passwordPolicy: 10+ chars with upper, lower, and a number.
auth.valNameMin: Enter your full name (at least 2 characters).
auth.valPhone: Enter a valid phone number (at least 7 digits).
auth.valPasswordShort: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
auth.valPasswordRules: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

dashboard.heroAlertOne: You have 1 alert to review. Credit, stock, or payments need attention.
dashboard.heroAlertMany: You have {{count}} alerts to review. Credit, stock, or payments need attention.
dashboard.heroTraderClear: Your purchasing desk is clear. Browse the marketplace when you are ready to buy.
dashboard.heroAdmin: Users, harvests, and sales roll up here. Jump to admin tools anytime.
dashboard.heroFarmer: Keep harvests and sales current so stock, profit, and alerts stay trustworthy.
dashboard.connectivityA: You don't need perfect internet. If the line drops, keep recording harvests and sales; the app stores them on this device. When you're back online, tap
dashboard.connectivityB: in the top bar to update the server.
dashboard.offlineModeBody: This app works without a live server, so you can keep recording harvests and sales in areas with no server link. Everything is stored on this device. When you have internet, tap Synced in the top bar to refresh with the server.
dashboard.momFirst: First cash-in this month. Last month had none.
dashboard.momNone: No cash-in yet this month vs last.
dashboard.purchasesEmpty: No purchases linked to your buyer name yet.

farmerWeather.title: Seasonal weather
farmerWeather.lead: Rainfall in the next two weeks, plus a May benchmark (typical long-rains month here). Use it with your full seasonal calendar to plan work across every season: dry, wet, and in between.
farmerWeather.loadError: Could not load weather data. Try again in a moment.
farmerWeather.noGeolocation: Location is not available on this device.
farmerWeather.geoDenied: Location permission was denied. Add a town or district on your profile, or keep the default point.
farmerWeather.alertBody: Sustained or heavy rain can limit field access, delay harvest, and complicate drying. Plan drainage, cover harvested produce where you can, and allow extra time for road transport in any season when downpours hit.
farmerWeather.histMay: Reference: past May (total rain, long-rains window)
farmerWeather.avgMayMm: May averages about {{mm}} mm here (over {{years}} years in the record), a wet-season reference for the whole year’s plan.
farmerWeather.noHistory: No usable May history for this map point. Try a larger nearby place on your profile or your device location.
farmerWeather.histHint: In many areas the long rains sit around {{month}}: one slice of a full-year schedule. Combine it with your seasonal calendar and the short forecast below.
farmerWeather.mayInWindow: The forecast window includes {{month}}: about {{total}} mm over {{days}} day(s), with {{heavy}} day(s) at or above {{mm}} mm (harder days for field work). Time tasks with your all-season plan.
farmerWeather.mayNotIn16: The 16-day forecast has not reached {{month}} yet. Check again soon and use the long-rains reference line above in the meantime.
farmerWeather.mayNotIn16Generic: If {{month}} is outside the short forecast, use the reference totals and your seasonal plans, and refresh as the date gets closer.
farmerWeather.fallbackGeocode: We could not place your profile location on the map, using a default point. Add a town, district, or “Uganda” on your profile, or use this device’s location.
farmerWeather.attrib: Data: Open-Meteo (open-meteo.com). No API key required.
farmerWeather.profileHint: We start from your profile location, then the buttons above.

stockPage.lead2: Totals per produce come from harvests minus sales. Sales are blocked if they exceed available tonnes (integrity). Low stock and oversold states show below; fix by adding harvests or adjusting sales. With the API on, data syncs when you are online.
stockPage.emptyHint: Log produce first. Totals appear automatically.

salesPage.lead1: Operational data (buyer, quantity, UGX) stays in your database.
salesPage.lead3: is used only when payment is settled through the wallet: the app stores the
salesPage.lead5: after confirmation so anyone can verify the transfer on-chain. For UGX without Sui, use
salesPage.lead7: (MTN or Airtel). Digital only; physical cash is not a first-class option in this app.
salesPage.emptyHint: Add a sale when you have stock.
salesPage.emptyHint2: Record a sale. Stock adjusts automatically.
salesPage.mockSuiNote: UGX sale works with Wallet off. This field is only for the optional on-chain link.
salesPage.creditRuleNote: Unpaid balance per sale and total open credit with this buyer name are capped at UGX {{max}} (combined). Use a consistent buyer name so the limit tracks the right counterparty.
salesPage.creditRuleBlock: Credit rules: Unpaid balance per sale and total open credit with this buyer name are capped at UGX {{max}} (combined). Use a consistent buyer name so the limit tracks the right counterparty.
salesPage.errTonnage: Enter a valid tonnage greater than zero.
salesPage.errTotal: Enter a valid total amount in UGX.
salesPage.toastSaved: Sale recorded. Stock, credit, and dashboard updated.
salesPage.digitalMomoNote: AgriTrack records digital UGX only. Add the mobile-money provider and receipt reference when you have it (optional on save; you can align with the buyer’s marketplace entry).

farmPage.toastBig: Image too large. Try under 1.5 MB
farmPage.toastBigPreview: Compressed preview still too large. Try a smaller photo
farmPage.harvestSaved: Harvest saved. Stock and dashboards update from this entry.

payTrust.momoPending: Digital UGX. Add reference in marketplace flow
payTrust.momoOk: MNO reference on file (stub; connect provider API in production)

unauthorized.title: Access restricted
unauthorized.areaNA: This area is not available for your role.
unauthorized.help: Use the account that matches the feature (farmer vs trader vs admin), or ask an administrator to change your role in the database. After API login, your role comes from the server.

forgotPage.title: Forgot password
forgotPage.lead: Enter your email. The server sends a reset link when SMTP is configured. Operators can also use server logs or a dev-only exposed link. Offline mode can show a local reset link if the account exists on this device.
forgotPage.swalDevNote: With email configured, check your inbox. Otherwise use the link shown or server logs.

searchPage.subtitle: Find produce, buyers, locations, and dates across data you are allowed to see.
searchPage.emptyTitle: Type in the header search box
searchPage.emptyHint: Enter a crop name, buyer, farm location, or date fragment. Results appear here for your role.
searchPage.noMatchesHint: Nothing matched "{{q}}". Try a shorter phrase or check spelling.

profilePage.contactLead: Used for notifications, SMS log, and matching trader purchases to your buyer name.
profilePage.suiHelpStart: Use the same network as your connected wallet. Copy from
profilePage.suiHelpEnd: or your Sui app. On mainnet, use real SUI; devnet and testnet use test tokens only.
profilePage.passwordNote: Password changes are not enabled in this build. Use API admin tools or re-register in non-production.
profilePage.securityLead: Role-based access is enforced in the app and on the API. Contact your administrator for role changes.
profilePage.errPhone: Enter a valid phone number (at least 7 digits).
profilePage.receivePaymentsLead: Shown to buyers on marketplace checkout so they send MoMo or bank transfers to the right place for each listing.
profilePage.receiveMoneyPhone: MoMo / mobile number to receive payment
profilePage.receiveMoneyPhoneHint: Leave blank to use your profile phone above.
profilePage.bankDetailsPlaceholder: Bank name, account name & number, branch…

marketplaceCheckoutPage.paySellerLead: Send from your MTN or Airtel wallet to the seller’s number below. AgriTrack does not move money for you — you pay in your MoMo app, then record the details here so the sale is on the ledger.
marketplaceCheckoutPage.yourWalletHint: The MTN or Airtel number you sent from (so the seller can match you).
marketplaceCheckoutPage.transactionRefHint: Paste the transaction ID from your MoMo SMS or app.
marketplaceCheckoutPage.platformEscrowNote: If your organization routes payments through the platform wallet instead, use this number:
marketplaceCheckoutPage.sellerMissingPayout: This seller has not added a receiving number in Profile — ask them to save MoMo or bank details there.

resetPage.title: Set new password
resetPage.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPage.needToken: This page needs a valid reset link.
resetPage.errMin: Password must be at least {{n}} characters.
resetPage.errRules: Password must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number.
resetPage.errMissingToken: Missing reset token. Request a new reset from the forgot-password page.
resetPage.success: Your password was updated. You can sign in now.
resetPage.minRules: At least 10 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and a number.

purchasesPage.lead: Orders and purchases: rows appear when a farmer records a sale with your buyer name ({{name}}). Stored in the database when using the API.
purchasesPage.emptyHint: When a farmer records a sale with you as buyer, it shows here.
